handbook-craftingguide-text:
RKN Generic Crafting Guide
These steps applies to any recipe that you would normally craft in the inventory crafting grid.

Basic Crafting
To start crafting, look at a surface and click rkncrafting.start + rightmouse while holding the first ingredient.
Once you have a crafting surface, as marked by 9 slots, you can add your first ingredient by holding the ingredient in your active hot-slot and clicking rightmouse while looking at the appropriate square. Continue adding ingredients until you have fulfilled the recipe grid shape from the perspective you are standing. For example if you are crafting a flint knife then you must place one stick in one of the slots in the middle or closest rows, and one knifeblade in the slot 'above' the stick. If you are successful, it should say "Selected: Flint knife" in the top info box. If you walk around the crafting surface, you will notice that it is only valid when looking at it from the correct perspective.
Now you can simply hold rightmouse with nothing in your hands to craft the item!

Tool use
In cases where the recipe requires a tool, like wormgrunter, it should not be placed on crafting surface. Instead you must first place all the ingredients, and craft while holding the tool in either your active hot-slot or your offhand slot.

Multi-step crafting
If we look at the recipe for bear figurehead, we will see that it requires whole 4 tools. But you cannot hold that many tools at the same time (unless you are secretly an octopus)! The solution to this is to start the crafting with some tool of the four. Now when you craft it will not spawn the figurehead, but instead an unfinished figurehead. To complete it, you must place the unfinished piece into a new crafting surface and use another of the remaining tools. When you have used all required tools you will receive the figurehead.
Note that the hammer and chisel can be used together if you put the hammer in your offhand!

Recipe selection
Should the ingredients for some reason match two or more separate recipes, you can select between them by looking at the crafting surface and pressing toolmodeselect.

Tools as ingredients
Some mods add recipes that consumes tools like ingredients. In case of this you can add the tool to the crafting surface with rkncrafting.start + rightmouse. Note that the handbook recipes will not make it known when this is the case.
